'''jahab''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cross siblings|cross siblings]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cross siblings|cross siblings]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhibith|jæhibith]] || [[word:jæhibij|jæhibij]] || [[word:jæhibish|jæhibish]] || [[word:jæhibi|jæhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahuhubuth|jahuhubuth]] || [[word:jahuhubuj|jahuhubuj]] || [[word:jahuhubush|jahuhubush]] || [[word:jahuhubu|jahuhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahubuth|jahubuth]] || [[word:jahubuj|jahubuj]] || [[word:jahubush|jahubush]] || [[word:jahubu|jahubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahufbuth|jahufbuth]] || [[word:jahufbuj|jahufbuj]] || [[word:jahufbush|jahufbush]] || [[word:jahufbuf|jahufbuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhebeth|jæhebeth]] || [[word:jæhebej|jæhebej]] || [[word:jæhebesh|jæhebesh]] || [[word:jæhebe|jæhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohoboth|jahohoboth]] || [[word:jahohoboj|jahohoboj]] || [[word:jahohobosh|jahohobosh]] || [[word:jahohobo|jahohobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahoboth|jahoboth]] || [[word:jahoboj|jahoboj]] || [[word:jahobosh|jahobosh]] || [[word:jahobo|jahobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofboth|jahofboth]] || [[word:jahofboj|jahofboj]] || [[word:jahofbosh|jahofbosh]] || [[word:jahofbof|jahofbof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:jahïfbïfth|jahïfbïfth]] || [[word:jahïfbïfj|jahïfbïfj]] || [[word:jahïfbïfsh|jahïfbïfsh]] || [[word:jahïfbïf|jahïfbïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:jahïfhïfbïfth|jahïfhïfbïfth]] || [[word:jahïfhïfbïfj|jahïfhïfbïfj]] || [[word:jahïfhïfbïfsh|jahïfhïfbïfsh]] || [[word:jahïfhïfbïf|jahïfhïfbïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhæbæth|jæhæbæth]] || [[word:jæhæbæj|jæhæbæj]] || [[word:jæhæbæsh|jæhæbæsh]] || [[word:jæhæbæ|jæhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahahabath|jahahabath]] || [[word:jahahabaj|jahahabaj]] || [[word:jahahabash|jahahabash]] || [[word:jahahaba|jahahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahabath|jahabath]] || [[word:jahabaj|jahabaj]] || [[word:jahabash|jahabash]] || [[word:jahaba|jahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahafbath|jahafbath]] || [[word:jahafbaj|jahafbaj]] || [[word:jahafbash|jahafbash]] || [[word:jahafbaf|jahafbaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahabatha|jahabatha]] || [[word:jahabaja|jahabaja]] || [[word:jahabasha|jahabasha]] || [[word:jahabaka|jahabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahabath|jahabath]] || [[word:jahabaj|jahabaj]] || [[word:jahabash|jahabash]] || [[word:jahaba|jahaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahabathal|jahabathal]] || [[word:jahabajal|jahabajal]] || [[word:jahabashal|jahabashal]] || [[word:jahabakal|jahabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahabathatha|jahabathatha]] || [[word:jahabajaja|jahabajaja]] || [[word:jahabashasha|jahabashasha]] || [[word:jahabaka|jahabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahabathan|jahabathan]] || [[word:jahabajan|jahabajan]] || [[word:jahabashan|jahabashan]] || [[word:jahabakan|jahabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahabathaoro|jahabathaoro]] || [[word:jahabajaoro|jahabajaoro]] || [[word:jahabashaoro|jahabashaoro]] || [[word:jahabakaoro|jahabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
